feed.title: filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: File Bankruptcy Without a Lawyer -- Pro Se Guide [2026]
entry.summary: How to file Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy without a lawyer. Forms, fees, means test, and court procedures. Complete 2026 pro se filing guide.

entry.title: Bankruptcy Petition Preparer -- What They Can and Cannot Do
entry.summary: Guide to bankruptcy petition preparers under 11 U.S.C. Section 110. What BPPs do, legal limits, fee caps, penalties, and when to use one vs. an attorney.

entry.title: Bankruptcy Software -- Best Tools for Filing Pro Se in 2026
entry.summary: Review of bankruptcy filing software for pro se debtors. Compare features, cost, and which tools best help you prepare your petition without a lawyer.

entry.title: Can I File Chapter 13 Myself? Pro Se Chapter 13 Guide
entry.summary: Can you file Chapter 13 bankruptcy without a lawyer? Technically yes, but here is why it is much harder than Chapter 7 and when you should hire an.

entry.title: Can I File Chapter 7 Myself? Pro Se Filing Guide
entry.summary: Can you file Chapter 7 bankruptcy without a lawyer? Yes. Step-by-step guide to filing pro se: forms, costs, risks, and when to hire an attorney instead.

entry.title: Filing Chapter 13 Bankruptcy Pro Se
entry.summary: Learn about filing chapter 13 bankruptcy pro se | filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com in our free 2026 guide.

entry.title: Filing Chapter 7 Bankruptcy Pro Se -- Step by Step
entry.summary: Complete step-by-step guide to filing Chapter 7 bankruptcy without a lawyer. Forms, timeline, means test, 341 meeting, and discharge.

entry.title: Common Pro Se Bankruptcy Mistakes to Avoid
entry.summary: Learn about common pro se bankruptcy mistakes to avoid | filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com in our free 2026 guide.

entry.title: Bankruptcy Credit Counseling Requirement
entry.summary: Learn about bankruptcy credit counseling requirement | filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com in our free 2026 guide.

entry.title: DIY Bankruptcy -- How to File Without a Lawyer
entry.summary: Complete guide to DIY bankruptcy filing. Step-by-step process, required forms, costs, timelines, and common mistakes to avoid when filing pro se.
